name: Summer Fruit Rice Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a rice cake on a plate.
2. Spread the softened cream cheese evenly over the rice cake.
3. Arrange the drained mandarin oranges around the cream cheese.
4. Add the sliced kiwifruit and strawberries on top of the other ingredients.
5. Each serving provides: 87 calories, 2.3 g protein, 2.0 g fat, 15.6 g carbohydrate,
0.9 g dietary fiber, 56 mg sodium, and 5 mg cholesterol.
Source: "Light, Lean & Low Fat" booklet (Reprinted with permission from USA Rice Council)
